title: ServiceNow IRM / GRC Specialist
description: Experience with Integrated Risk Management, Policy & Compliance, or Vendor Risk modules. CIS-Risk and Compliance certification a plus. Strong understanding of GRC frameworks preferred.

title: ServiceNow HRSD Consultant
description: Hands-on HRSD implementation experience required. Case management, employee journeys, and HR Portal configuration are key focus areas. Experience with HR integrations is a strong plus.

title: ServiceNow ITAM / SAM Administrator
description: Software Asset Management or IT Asset Management expertise. Discovery integration, reconciliation, and reporting experience preferred. Knowledge of SCCM, JAMF, or similar tools is a plus.

title: ServiceNow AI / Virtual Agent Developer
description: NLU, Virtual Agent Designer, and AI Search experience required. Familiarity with Now Assist and predictive intelligence a strong plus. Experience building conversation flows and topic design preferred.

title: ServiceNow ITOM / Discovery Specialist
description: Service Mapping, CMDB health, Discovery patterns, and MID Server experience required. CIS-ITOM certification preferred. Strong understanding of network topology and cloud environments a plus.

title: ServiceNow Developer / Configurator
description: Scripting, Flow Designer, IntegrationHub, and UI Builder skills required. CSA required; CAD preferred. Experience with REST API integrations and custom application development a strong plus.
